{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032208294182E54514C1DB631A0687"}"},"total":428},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7573111140059169598","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"最近读了一本国运类小说，作者的写作功底确实让人印象深刻。小说情节紧凑，人物刻画细腻，尤其是对历史背景的描绘，真实而生动。每章都让人欲罢不能，仿佛置身其中，感受着时代的变迁与人物的命运起伏。这种沉浸式的阅读体验，让我对作者的才华赞叹不已。总体而言，这本小说是国运类中的佳作，强烈推荐给喜欢这一类型的读者。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763256189,"group_id":"7542378227411455038","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/MHJhsI2soML3P46T0BFlg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"101256785646","user_name":"西门豹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101256785646","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7542378227411455038","book_info":{"abstract":"【直播鉴神+国运竞技+神话复苏+爽爆无敌+华夏神话杀疯了】
赤星划破天空，灵气复苏，世界剧变，神明雕像降临蓝星！
诵神明真名可得神力，颂神明事迹可使神临！
然而华夏神话历史断层，万千神明无名无姓，无神可以唤醒，华夏沦为西方笑柄，遭全球蔑视！
苏凡穿越而来，绑定直播鉴神系统——
打赏就能解锁华夏神明真名，甚至能自定义培养神明！
开局指点冰山女总裁唤醒嫦娥：
“谁说嫦娥是舞姬？睁大眼看好了！”
冰山女总裁当场契约S级嫦娥，全网震撼！
从此，苏凡直播间成了全华夏关注的地方。
无数神豪大佬一掷千金，只为能让苏凡帮忙鉴定神明雕像！
同时，苏凡契约无数的神明，用大圣金棍荡平奥林匹斯，叫杨戬天眼射穿天使圣城，使哪吒脚踏风火轮核爆富士山；
他随手一点，盘古开天斧横跨太平洋，一斧头劈烂自由女神像！
西方人崩溃跪地：“停停停！这不是我们认识的华夏明！这画风不对啊！”
三年国运大战，苏凡携亿万华夏神明降临赛场。
他立于不周山巅，微微一笑：
“别急，今天才刚轮到……刑天出场。”
#西方神明已被移出群聊#
#华夏神话到底是什么怪物版本#
#苏神，求你别鉴了，西方真的不够砸了啊#","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1b2e5d42f7e7da1dd4e4b6c7d176b366","author":"大学里的小聪明","author_id":"","book_id":"7542378227411455038","book_name":"华夏无神？我直播鉴定亿万神明","book_short_name":"直播鉴华夏神","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7542378298450395710","read_count":"47618","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"954074"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.8","serial_count":"320","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,直播,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/698b6a4119d868708c41aaa9c91f3179~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779323381&x-signature=Rmc25S5LeP%2BUqZ8JfLVBriU3RTg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3227771965546660","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"10"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032208294182E54514C1DB631A0687"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"l
